new-request.title: New Commission Request
new-request.description: Sent to the shop owner when a customer submits a commission request.
new-request.subject: New custom {craft_type} request from {customer_name}
new-request.heading: New Commission Request

quote-sent.title: Commission Quote
quote-sent.description: Sent to the customer when the maker sends a quote for their commission.
quote-sent.subject: Your custom {craft_type} quote from {site_name}
quote-sent.heading: Your Quote is Ready

quote-accepted.title: Commission Accepted
quote-accepted.description: Sent to the shop owner when a customer accepts a quote.
quote-accepted.subject: {customer_name} accepted their {craft_type} commission
quote-accepted.heading: Quote Accepted

quote-declined.title: Commission Declined
quote-declined.description: Sent to the shop owner when a customer declines a quote.
quote-declined.subject: {customer_name} declined their {craft_type} commission
quote-declined.heading: Quote Declined

commission-complete.title: Commission Complete
commission-complete.description: Sent to the customer when the maker marks a commission as complete.
commission-complete.subject: Your custom {craft_type} from {site_name} is complete!
commission-complete.heading: Your Piece is Ready
